Video.summary: A group of wagons begins to run out of food and water after becoming trapped in a hot desert.
Video.title: How Death Valley Got Its Name

Image.alt: How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name

Video.summary: A butterfly collector comes to Death Valley and not only finds moths but discovers his true love.
Video.title: The Chivaree

Video.summary: Two rival restaurant owners see their competition take a romantic turn.
Video.title: The Rival Hash Houses

Video.summary: Mary Helen Crosby conceals government papers in her umbrella to insure their safe arrival.
Video.title: The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella

Image.alt: The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella

Video.summary: A young man must prove his identity in order to marry the white girl he loves.
Video.title: Swamper Ike

Video.summary: A society belle finds herself living in Carson City, Nev., known as Little Washington.
Video.title: Little Washington

Video.summary: The new schoolteacher tames her unruly classroom by demonstrating her skills with a six shooter.
Video.title: Dear Teacher

Video.summary: A woman in love with a fire chief has a rival: a flashy fire engine.
Video.title: Little Papeete

Video.summary: The discovery of a nugget weighing 12 pounds causes an uproar in a California gold town.
Video.title: The Twelve Pound Nugget

Video.summary: Jimmy Dayton hopes to win the hand of a gold-digging dance girl.
Video.title: Jimmy Dayton's Treasure

Video.summary: John Thompson wants to get the mail out during the winters and comes up with ways to make it happen.
Video.title: Snowshoe Thompson

Video.summary: Cowpoke Curt Morrison and pal Josh locate a spring on Native land soon to be opened to homesteaders.
Video.title: The Kickapoo Run

Video.summary: A newspaper man bets his girlfriend's father that he can make a fortune in three days.
Video.title: Mr. Godiva

Video.summary: A member of the Laguna tribe refuses to return a venerated portrait to neighboring braves.
Video.title: The Saint's Portrait

Video.summary: A politician tries to get Columbia picked as California's capital city.
Video.title: 11,000 Miners Can't Be Wrong

Video.summary: A teacher stages a holdup as a joke but decides to make a career of it.
Video.title: Black Bart The PO8

Video.summary: Two men fight to rid Virginia City of its corrupt judicial system.
Video.title: The Light on the Mountain

Video.summary: The story of Cherokee tribesman Sequoia, who developed the Cherokee written language.
Video.title: Sequoia

Video.summary: A man must collect back taxes and hires some muscle for assistance, but a surprise awaits him.
Video.title: Death and Taxes

Video.summary: Prospectors offer a friend shares in their mine if he'll marry the homely Aggie Filene.
Video.title: Million Dollar Wedding

Video.summary: A crystal ball sends the seventh daughter of a seventh daughter West to seek her fortune.
Video.title: The Crystal Gazer

Video.summary: A young bandit is robbing banks and businesses in a sheriff's territory.
Video.title: The Death Valley Kid

Video.summary: Zack and Zeke, slaves from Louisville, seek to buy their freedom by digging for gold.
Video.title: Land of the Free

Video.summary: A miner turned lawyer falls in love.
Video.title: Whirlwind Courtship

Video.summary: A young miner is afflicted with a monumental problem: claustrophobia.
Video.title: Yaller

Video.summary: Bandits board a gold-carrying ship and murder most of the passengers and crew.
Video.title: I Am Joaquin

Video.summary: Blind and bitter Susie witnesses a stage robbery and her heightened senses play a key role.
Video.title: Sixth Sense

Video.summary: The romance of young lovers is threatened by their feuding families.
Video.title: Halfway Girl

Video.summary: Saloonkeeper Shanghai Kelly kidnaps crewmen for understaffed ships.
Video.title: Shanghai Kelly's Birthday Party

Video.summary: A wife drives a stagecoach to transport silver to Hillsboro after bandits attack her husband.
Video.title: The Saga of Sadie Orchard

Video.summary: Two prospectors pull a hoax on a banker who wants their mine.
Video.title: The Great Diamond Mines

Video.summary: Life on the prairie is anything but easy for a newly married Swedish immigrant.
Video.title: Britta Goes Home

Video.summary: Jesse Martin stirs up a town: he claims there's a payload of gold lying right beneath Main Street.
Video.title: Gold Mine on Main Street

Video.summary: A Dakota wife left on her own becomes the unwilling servant of two opportunistic highwaymen.
Video.title: The Sage Hen

Video.summary: A teacher engaged to a minister tries to conceal her gambling.
Video.title: Lottie's Legacy

Video.summary: John Slaughter's deputy poses a problem: the maverick is prone to violence and accepting bribes.
Video.title: A Shortcut Through Tombstone

Video.summary: Two outlaws devise a mining operation and finance it with stolen bullion.
Video.title: How to Beat a Badman

Video.summary: Mormons must save the life of a dying man or face the wrath of his tribe.
Video.title: A Key for the Fort

Video.summary: A convict is released from prison, but not released from his past.
Video.title: Tracy's Triumph

Video.summary: Inspector Wesley Hull is determined to discover how postmaster Jack Reardon can sell so many stamps.
Video.title: The Biggest Little Post Office in the World

Image.alt: The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World

Video.summary: John Clum is given a task of turning a group of Apache men into a force that aids the U.S. Calvary.
Video.title: Clum's Constabulary

Video.summary: A gambler is determined to collect his poker winnings: half of Tombstone, Arizona.
Video.title: The Duke of Tombstone

Video.summary: This tale of misadventure focuses on Frank Baum's penning of The Wonderful Wizard of Oz.
Video.title: The Wizard of Aberdeen
